description: License-first federated image search with attribution, dimensions, and download tooling.
name: io.github.ashlrai/webfetch

environmentVariables.description: Optional Unsplash API key for Unsplash provider results.
environmentVariables.name: UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Pexels API key for Pexels provider results.
environmentVariables.name: PEXELS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Pixabay API key for Pixabay provider results.
environmentVariables.name: PIXABAY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Brave Search API key for Brave image search results.
environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional SerpApi key for Google Images results.
environmentVariables.name: SERPAPI_KEY

title: webfetch
